subcodes.first_line: And concerning Mirza Mahdi Hikmat, of whom thou didst write: verily, this person hath no truthfulness and will not conform [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و در خصوص ميرزا مهدی حکمت مرقوم نموده بوديد. اين شخص صداقت ندارد و موافقت نخواهد
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @personal instructions, @firmness in the Covenant
